query:
SELECT urc.user_id, urc.role, urc.city_id, c.name as city_name 
FROM user_role_cities urc 
LEFT JOIN cities c ON urc.city_id = c.id 
WHERE urc.user_id = 13860029 
ORDER BY urc.role, c.name;
